cli.usage:
tmoes — GNU/Linux Container Manager (Modern C++17 Edition)

Usage:
  tmoes                       Enter interactive TUI menu
  tmoes [mode] [args...]      Parse and launch container via positional state machine

Global Options:
  --lang <zh_CN|en_US>       Override display language
  --quiet                    Quiet mode (suppress DEBUG output)
  --no-color                 Disable colored terminal output
  --help, -h                 Show this help

faq.android12:
Q: Android 12+ crash?
A: Run menu 10 to fix signal 9 restriction.
faq.no_sound:
Q: No sound in container?
A: Install pulseaudio and check environment variables.
